title: Bug-Out in 15 Minutes
description: A time-critical sequence for evacuating your home under threat. Complete each step before moving to the next.

steps.title: Security Assessment
steps.summary: Identify immediate threats before any other action

steps.title: Grab Your Bag
steps.summary: 72-hour bag ready to go — know where it is

steps.title: Vehicle Check
steps.summary: Your vehicle must be ready to move immediately

steps.title: Route Planning
steps.summary: Know your primary and alternate routes

steps.title: Depart
steps.summary: Execute the plan — movement is survival
checklistItems: Utilities off if safe to do
